content:
📜 4. Forced Infection Mechanics – Who Becomes the Transformed?

📜 If no one selects a transformative path, a player is randomly infected based on hidden metrics.

✔ How Forced Infection Works:
• If no player willingly selects a transformation path, one will be randomly assigned.
• The selection is based on a calculated negative score OR a dice roll.
• Metrics for “negative score” calculation include:
• How often they acted against their faction.
• Failed skill checks & betrayals.
• Level of alignment drift toward chaos.

✔ Examples of Forced Infections:
• The Dark Bargain: The student with the most failed negotiations gets “offered” a deal.
• The Cursed Scholar: The student who pushed boundaries too often gains a forbidden power.
• The Mark of the Betrayer: The player who had the most suspicion cast on them is forcibly transformed.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 505 (chunk 505/555)
